_note: F-1 reference fixture. Validates pipeline behavior on an FDA medical device warning letter with quality system deficiencies.
submitter_note: FDA warning letter — medical device quality system deficiencies requiring CAPA
case_description: FDA warning letter to Uscom Kft citing quality system deficiencies in a medical device manufacturer. Covers CAPA gaps, cleaning/disinfection validation failures, nonconforming product controls, and an adulterated/misbranded device finding. Expected to produce a High severity output with escalation triggered by an explicit escalation recommendation.
